chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1487 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.6290/2023 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 19.12.2023 Mr. Ghulam Rasool Chandio, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the petitioners submits that this petition has achieved its purpose as the matter has been disposed of under ‘C’ class by the IO, and such order has been passed by the Magistrate concerned. IO, present in Court, has also filed such report. Accordingly, in view of above, this petition is disposed of along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
